name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Withdrawals have a new "Store + actual paid" option: set how much comes from store credit and how much from the bank — the leftover automatically becomes unclaimed credit (records 4 linked entries).
Dates now read in a clearer day-month-year style everywhere, e.g. 26-Jun-26, and times/log timestamps include seconds.
Members list newest-first with a Sort menu, and every entry pop-up shows the selected bank's balance.
